query:
SELECT 
  cc.bookingId,
  cc.grossAmount,
  cc.vatAmount,
  cc.status as commissionStatus,
  cc.paidAt
FROM commission_claims cc
WHERE cc.agentId = 60600
ORDER BY cc.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
